title: Reticle proxy network.* event payload
description: Typed shape of the payload carried by proxy-sourced network.request / network.response / network.error events. The host proxy is the sole producer; this schema pins the fields so the Swift emitter and any consumer cannot silently drift.

requestId.description: Stable id shared by the request/response/error events of one transaction.

durationMs.description: endMillis - startMillis, present only alongside endMillis.

status.description: HTTP status when a response (or mock) is available.

error.description: Proxy or upstream failure text; present on network.error.

tunnel.description: True for HTTPS CONNECT tunnel observations.

mitm.description: True only for decrypted HTTPS requests admitted by the MITM allowlist.

requestHeaders.description: Display-safe request headers; sensitive values are redacted before logging.

responseHeaders.description: Display-safe response headers; sensitive values are redacted before logging.

requestBodyBytes.description: Full captured request body size in bytes, present when a body was stored.

responseBodyBytes.description: Full captured response body size in bytes, present when a body was stored.

requestBodyTruncated.description: True when the stored request artifact is capped below the full body size.

responseBodyTruncated.description: True when the stored response artifact is capped below the full body size.

mocked.description: True when the proxy returned a configured mock instead of contacting upstream.
